summary: Iteration 122: Tested notification refinement features. Backend: 18/19 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All features verified - bottom nav has Events bell (no TV/Sfide), filter tabs work, severity badges display correctly, popup priority system implemented.

minor.issue: Old high_revenue notifications have link=/create-film instead of /films/{id}. Code is fixed but existing DB records not migrated.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking 'Successo al Botteghino' notification navigates to /create-film instead of /films/{id} due to old notification link in DB

action_items: Add migration script to fix existing high_revenue/flop_warning notification links from /create-film to /films/{id}
Verify new notifications created after the fix have correct links
critical_code_review_comments: scheduler_tasks.py: high_revenue/flop_warning notifications correctly use link=f'/films/{project["id"]}' (line 902, 908)
server.py: interact_coming_soon correctly checks content_status for link generation (line 9983-9987)
App.js: Popup throttle POPUP_THROTTLE_MS=7000 (7 seconds) correctly implemented
App.js: Popup priority system correctly classifies critical/important/positive notifications
NotificationsPage.jsx: Filter tabs and severity badges working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification refinement features verified. Code correctly generates links: /create-film for in-progress films (coming_soon/casting/screenplay/production), /films/{id} for completed films. Popup priority: critical=popup, important=toast, positive=badge only. Anti-spam: 7 second throttle. Bottom nav: Events bell only (no TV/Sfide). Old notifications in DB may have incorrect links - migration needed.

backend: GET /api/notifications - returns notifications with severity field
GET /api/notifications/popup - returns unread notifications not shown as popup, marks shown_popup=True
Authentication required for all notification endpoints
frontend: Mobile bottom nav has Events (Eventi) bell icon - NO TV button, NO Sfide button
NotificationsPage filter tabs: Tutte, Critiche, Importanti, Positive
Filter tabs correctly filter notifications by severity
Severity badges show correct colors (red=critical, yellow=important, green=positive)
Popup priority system: critical=popup overlay, important=toast, positive=badge only
Anti-spam throttle: max 1 popup every 7 seconds (POPUP_THROTTLE_MS=7000)
